Reason_for_Visit.summary: New patient evaluation for newly diagnosed malignant neoplasm of upper-outer quadrant of right breast, stage IB triple negative breast cancer, for initial consult and discussion of adjuvant chemotherapy and port placement

Clinical_Findings.findings: Triple negative breast cancer with 75% tumor size, node negative

Current_Medications.current_meds: amoxicillin (AMOXIL) 500 mg capsule, cephalexin (KEFLEX) 500 mg capsule, cetirizine (ZYRTEC) 10 mg tablet, diphenhydrAMINE (BENADRYL) 25 mg capsule, levothyroxine 125 mcg tablet

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Treatment_Goals.current_meds: amoxicillin, ascorbic acid, cephalexin, cetirizine, diphenhydrAMINE, levothyroxine

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Response_Assessment.current_meds: amoxicillin, ascorbic acid, cephalexin, cetirizine, diphenhydrAMINE, levothyroxine

chemotherapy.summary: will decrease the risk of systemic recurrence

radiotherapy.summary: will decrease the risk of local recurrence

other treatment.summary: will have port placement at surgery

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: We discussed the role of chemotherapy to decrease the risk of systemic recurrence.

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: The patient will undergo adjuvant chemotherapy to decrease the risk of systemic recurrence. The plan is to start chemotherapy after surgery. The role of radiation to decrease the risk of local recurrence was also discussed.
Therapy_plan.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

radiotherapy_plan.radiotherapy_plan: decrease the risk of local recurrence

Procedure_Plan.procedure_plan: surgery first for reductions bilaterally and a right lumpectomy with sentinel node, port placement

follow_up_next_visit.Next clinic visit: RTC at her post op visit to review final pathology report and make recommendations
